summary: Student Performance Dashboard feature fully tested and working. All 5 test scenarios passed: My Performance button visible, dashboard loads with correct data (Tests Taken=1, Average Score=81.8%, Best Score=81.8%, Recent Trend=N/A), subject-wise breakdown shows Mathematics at 81.8%, question type analysis shows 5 types (MCQ/True-False/Numerical at 100%, Short Answer at 66.7%, One Word at 0%), recent tests timeline shows 'Math Chapter 1 - AI Evaluated' with grade A/9-11/81.8%, and back button returns to subject selection page.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data - 'Math Chapter 1 - AI Evaluated' with score 9/11 (81.8%)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Student Performance Dashboard feature is fully functional. Dashboard API endpoint GET /api/structured-tests/student/performance working correctly. The StudentPerformanceDashboard component correctly displays: 4 summary cards, subject-wise breakdown, question type analysis with strength/weakness indicators, and recent tests timeline with grade badges. Score Trend chart only appears when 2+ tests exist (currently hidden as expected with 1 test). All data-testid attributes work: spd-dashboard, spd-summary, spd-total-tests, spd-avg-pct, spd-best-pct, spd-trend, spd-subjects, spd-question-types, spd-timeline, spd-back, performance-dashboard-btn.
